dg_neuroblast.proposed_name: Dentate Gyrus Neuroblast / Immature Granule Neuron
dg_neuroblast.mapping_rationale: CL:0000031 is the canonical vertebrate neuroblast class ('a cell that will develop into a neuron often after a migration phase') and encompasses SVZ/SGZ-born migrating DCX+ neuroblasts. The proposed type is a region-specific instance. CL:1000042 (forebrain neuroblast) is a subclass and is also a BROAD match. No dentate-gyrus-specific neuroblast or immature granule neuron term exists in CL; CL:2000089 (dentate gyrus granule cell) covers only the mature, terminally differentiated stage and is not a match.

additional_broad_matches.note: Subclass of CL:0000031 scoped to forebrain — closer anatomical match

related_mature_term.note: Terminal mature stage; definition references PMID:17765709

pir_immature_neuron.proposed_name: Piriform Cortex Layer II Immature Neuron
pir_immature_neuron.mapping_rationale: CL:4042028 ('a neuron in the central nervous system that is not committed to a differentiated fate, has not been newly derived from neurogenesis, and does not integrate into any circuit') matches the biological description of piriform cortex layer II immature neurons (DCX+/PSA-NCAM+, no c-Fos/Arc, no NMDA receptors, prolonged non-integrated state). This is a BROAD match because CL:4042028 is CNS-wide; no piriform-cortex-specific immature neuron term exists in CL. CL:4042029 (cortical immature neuron) does not apply as it is defined as a prenatally-derived, lifelong immature neuron of neocortex — the piriform cortex is allocortex/paleocortex and the biology differs.
pir_immature_neuron.note: No piriform-cortex-specific immature neuron CL term found. Potential CL contribution: a 'piriform cortex layer II immature neuron' as a subclass of CL:4042028.

ob_neuroblast.mapping_rationale: CL:0000031 covers SVZ-born type A migrating neuroblasts (PSA-NCAM+/TuJ1+/DCX+, GFAP-) en route to the olfactory bulb via the rostral migratory stream. CL:1000042 (forebrain neuroblast) is a more specific BROAD match as OB is a forebrain structure. The terminal fate splits: CL:0000626 (olfactory granule cell, synonym: 'olfactory bulb granule cell') covers GABAergic granule neurons in GCL; CL:1001435 (periglomerular cell) covers GABAergic periglomerular neurons in glomerular layer. Neither terminal fate term is a match for the migrating neuroblast stage described in the proposed type.

additional_broad_matches.note: Subclass of CL:0000031 scoped to forebrain

related_mature_terms.note: Terminal GABAergic fate in granule cell layer
Terminal GABAergic fate in glomerular layer
Broad mature interneuron parent class; definition references PMID:18603310

str_immature_neuron.mapping_rationale: No CL term for a striatum-specific immature/neuroblast cell was found. Searches for 'striatum interneuron', 'immature neuron striatum', 'SVZ neuroblast striatum' all returned only generic terms (CL:0002613 striatum neuron, CL:0000031 neuroblast). CL:0000031 could be used as a BROAD parent, but given the proposed type is characterised only by BrdU+/DCX+ with minimal description (1 quote, no confirmed subtypes), a direct BROAD assignment is not confident. Closest generic options: CL:0000031 (BROAD) or CL:0002613 (striatum neuron, post-integration, NOT a match).

broad_fallback.note: Usable as placeholder BROAD parent only; evidence for striatal neurogenesis is thin and controversial

str_immature_neuron.note: No CL term found for striatum-specific immature neuron — potential CL contribution if striatal adult neurogenesis is confirmed.

cx_immature_neuron.proposed_name: Cerebral Cortex Layer II Immature Neuron
cx_immature_neuron.mapping_rationale: CL:4042029 is defined as 'An immature neuron of a cerebral cortex. This neuron develops prenatally and remains in an immature state throughout the lifespan of the organism.' This is an EXACT match: the proposed type (DCX+/NeuN-, layer II of neocortex, particularly limbic cortices, species-dependent) is precisely the non-neurogenic cortical immature neuron class that CL:4042029 was created to represent. Synonym 'cIN' is used in the field. CL:4042028 (immature neuron, CNS-wide) is a broader parent.
